paragraph: The single-family market in East Rutherford is tight and moving fast. Six homes sold over six months at a median of $760,000, and they're selling right at list price with a median of 17 and a half days on market. Half of them went above asking, which tells you that priced homes are moving and buyers are competing for inventory. Multi-family properties, by contrast, are even more sparse at only three sales, but they're selling well above list at a median of $990,000 and closing in about two weeks. Every multi-family home that sold went over asking, and the sale-to-list ratio of 1.12 shows real buyer demand in that category. The constraint here isn't market heat. It's volume. If you're looking in East Rutherford, you're working with a very limited pool of homes, which means pricing matters and condition matters more than it would in a higher-inventory market. You'll want to move decisively when the right property shows up.
